name: custom_ref::if_alternate::watch_effect_function::named
source: import { customRef, ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = customRef(() => ({ get: () => true, set: (_value: boolean) => {} })); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(function () { if (guard.value) { sink(); } else { payload.value; } });

name: custom_ref::if_alternate::watch_effect_function::namespace
source: import * as Vue from 'vue'; const guard = Vue.customRef(() => ({ get: () => true, set: (_value: boolean) => {} })); const payload = Vue.ref(0); Vue.watchEffect(function () { if (guard.value) { sink(); } else { payload.value; } });

name: custom_ref::logical_rhs::watch_effect_arrow::named
source: import { customRef, ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = customRef(() => ({ get: () => true, set: (_value: boolean) => {} })); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { guard.value && payload.value; });
